description_long: This is a long, narrow canoe with a pointed bow and stern, constructed primarily from wood with visible blue-gray seating and thwarts across its interior. The exterior hull displays a natural wood grain finish, while the interior features several crosswise seats and structural bars for support and stability. The gunwales run along the top edges, providing reinforcement and a place to grip or attach accessories. At each end, there are small carrying handles for easy transport. The canoe appears to be designed for multiple occupants, with enough space for paddlers and gear. No registration numbers or identification markings are visible on the hull.
description: A wooden canoe with blue-gray seats and thwarts, pointed ends, and carrying handles, designed for multiple occupants.
description_view_0: The canoe is seen from an angled top-down view, highlighting the interior seats and thwarts, as well as the pointed bow.
description_view_1: A side view of the canoe, showing the long, slender profile and the continuous gunwales along the top edge.
description_view_2: The opposite top-down angle reveals the stern and the arrangement of the interior seating and thwarts.
description_view_3: Another side view, focusing on the opposite side of the hull and the visible wood grain texture.
